headline: Mastercard, Visa make deals to jolt stablecoins
summary: In separate arrangements, Mastercard is working with SoFi and Visa is working with Bridge to build scale in anticipation of greater demand for the digital asset.

headline: Is Mastercard (MA) Offering Value After Recent Share Price Pullback And Mixed Valuation Signals
summary: If you are looking at Mastercard and wondering whether the current share price offers good value, this article will walk you through what the numbers are saying rather than the market noise. The stock last closed at US$521.00, with returns of 5.0% over the past week, a 3.3% decline over the past month, a 7.5% decline year to date, an 8.9% decline over 1 year, and gains of 44.5% over 3 years and 44.4% over 5 years. Recent price moves sit against a backdrop of ongoing product launches,...

headline: Mastercard reinforces commitment to Canadian small business owners as the Mastercard Small Business Fund opens for 2026 applicants
summary: Today, Mastercard opens applications for the Mastercard Small Business Fund, giving women small business owners in Canada the opportunity to receive a $10,000 CAD grant and resources to equip their business for future growth. Along with funding, grant recipients will receive tailored mentorship, support for growing their business digitally, and a Priceless Experience in Toronto.

headline: Mastercard and Visa Cards Reach $10 Trillion in Spending in 2025
summary: Latest issue of the Nilson Report Shows Continued Growth for Visa and Mastercard in the USSANTA BARBARA, Calif., March 03, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Spending for goods and services generated by credit, debit and prepaid cards issued in the US reached $10 trillion for the first time in 2025, according to the Nilson Report. Credit cards generated 50.42% of all spending, which was down from 50.50% of the total in 2024. Purchase volume on Visa credit, debit and prepaid card products was $7.028 trilli
